film.title: Promised Land
film.overview: A salesman for a natural gas company experiences life-changing events after arriving in a small town, where his corporation wants to tap into the available resources.

dialogues.dialogue: and studied something other than agriculture.  It's the biggest fight my grandfather and I ever had.  Just the pride, I guess.  No. It's delusional self mythology. It's b******t.  We had a Caterpillar plant down in Davenport a few miles away.
VP of Land Management.  Well, that's great!  I'm proud of ya.  Holy s**t.  Danny, I don't know what to say.
Why?  Why?  Pride? Of what? What do you got?  S**t, how much of it is even yours?  I bet all of you are getting subsidy checks from the government. Right?

"This is our barn. Who else is going to do it?"  I used to think the guy was crazy.  And stubborn. Proud.  But, see. I think... He was just trying to teach me what it meant to take care of something.  He was just trying to teach me what it meant to take care of something.
